progressTracker.title: Fluency
progressTracker.insight: Improved structure and clarity in extended speaking, especially when retelling trips, experiences and current events.

progressTracker.title: Listening
progressTracker.insight: Understands complex real-world input such as BBC news, AI discussions and political topics with effective verification strategies.

progressTracker.title: Vocabulary
progressTracker.insight: Expanding with better nuance, emotional expression and precision across travel, geopolitics, business, cooking and daily life.

progressTracker.title: Grammar
progressTracker.insight: Clear progress in past tense accuracy, self-correction and sentence completion, with ongoing work on natural phrasing and consistency.

progressTracker.title: Analytical Discussion
progressTracker.insight: Explains, connects and evaluates complex ideas effectively, especially in geopolitics, public affairs and AI in business.

attendanceOverview.title: Italy trip storytelling and BBC current events
attendanceOverview.summary: Rafael shared his recent trip to Italy with clear chronological storytelling and strong communicative instinct. The lesson also introduced a BBC report about Iran, strengthening listening comprehension, memory recall and real-world retelling.

attendanceOverview.title: Advanced fluency, geopolitics and international relations
attendanceOverview.summary: The class focused on advanced conversation fluency, narrative skills and geopolitical vocabulary. Rafael showed strong curiosity about global events and strong potential for advanced fluency development.

attendanceOverview.title: Lifestyle, technology and political institutions
attendanceOverview.summary: The lesson moved from health, nutrition and technology into public institutions and political developments in Rio. Rafael communicated with confidence in familiar real-life topics while grammar precision became the next growth target.

attendanceOverview.title: Dream storytelling plus AI in business and society
attendanceOverview.summary: Rafael handled spontaneous speaking, listening and interpretation around AI and business with strong analytical thinking. The key priority was improving verb accuracy and core sentence patterns without losing communicative power.

attendanceOverview.title: Structured storytelling, emotions and family language dynamics
attendanceOverview.summary: This lesson developed guided speaking with scaffolding, emotional vocabulary and clarity in past forms. Rafael showed noticeable improvement in self-correction and stronger narrative organization when supported by structure.

attendanceOverview.title: Homes, cooking processes and complex political explanation
attendanceOverview.summary: The class combined house and kitchen vocabulary with discussion of a complex political scenario at Alerj. Rafael explained a difficult real-world topic with very few gaps and showed stronger consolidation of the past simple.

goals.title: Increase structural precision without losing fluency
goals.description: Keep the current communicative confidence while improving sentence control, clearer connectors and more refined vocabulary choices.

goals.title: Consolidate past tense consistency in storytelling
goals.description: Strengthen past simple accuracy, reduce overuse of continuous forms and keep self-correction active in real speaking situations.

goals.title: Expand active vocabulary in high-value topics
goals.description: Use cumulative vocabulary from travel, geopolitics, business, emotions and daily life more naturally during live classes.

vocabularyBank.example: She needed her birth certificate to apply for a passport.

vocabularyBank.meaning: legal status of belonging to a country

vocabularyBank.example: We checked in our luggage before boarding.

vocabularyBank.meaning: prompted by feelings of tenderness, sadness or nostalgia
vocabularyBank.example: I felt sentimental when I visited my grandfather's hometown.

vocabularyBank.meaning: vacation house used on weekends or holidays
vocabularyBank.example: We usually go to our holiday home in Teresopolis on weekends.

vocabularyBank.meaning: the prepared mixture used to make pizza
vocabularyBank.example: I make the pizza dough and leave it to rest for a few hours.

grammarOverview.title: Grammar Overview
grammarOverview.summary: Rafael is moving from developing to improving in the most visible speaking structures. The portfolio shows real gains in self-correction, especially in past forms, while the next step is consistency and precision.
focusPoints: Past tense consistency: accurate use of past simple in storytelling with reduced overuse of continuous forms
Sentence structure and completion: building complete, connected sentences without interruption
Natural phrasing and comparatives: avoiding literal translation and choosing more natural English structures
Passive voice for reporting: using more formal and news-style communication when discussing institutions and current events
Say vs tell: using the correct structure for listener and message

teacherFeedback.title: Monthly teacher feedback
teacherFeedback.body: Rafael continues to demonstrate strong communicative ability and confidence when discussing complex real-world topics. His fluency and analytical thinking remain major strengths, and recent lessons show clear progress in grammatical awareness, particularly with past tense usage and self-correction.

teacherFeedback.title: Current growth priority
teacherFeedback.body: The next step is increasing consistency and precision in structure and vocabulary choice so his communication becomes more refined and advanced without losing spontaneity.

classReports.teacherInsight: Language used in real life stays alive. Rafael showed strong communicative instinct, focusing on meaning and interaction instead of perfection.
Rafael is already capable of discussing professional experiences, international news and geopolitical analysis with excellent potential for advanced fluency development.
His fluency allows him to engage in complex discussions connected to his real life. The next step is grammatical precision while maintaining this level of communication.
Rafael shows strong analytical thinking and can interpret challenging real-world content effectively. With more precision, his communication will become even stronger.
His emotional awareness and reflective thinking add depth to his communication. With structure, his speech becomes clearer, more organized and more natural.

focus: Types of houses and cooking vocabulary
classReports.teacherInsight: Rafael showed significant progress explaining a highly complex political situation in English with very few gaps, while also consolidating the past simple through self-correction.
